impact: This advances the PP&D plan by proving Urban Forestry application draft review can generate a safe preview while refusing official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, and inspection scheduling unless the current session provides exact action-specific confirmation.
summary: Add deterministic Urban Forestry DevHub draft-review guardrail tests with a redacted fixture.
target_task: Task checkbox-110: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving Urban Forestry application draft review can produce a preview but cannot perform official upload, certification, submission, payment, cancellation, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
